shops.name: La La Land Kind Cafe

sources.label: Axios Charlotte - Charlotte is getting the viral La La Land Kind Cafe
What Now Charlotte - La La Land Kind Cafe Joining Charlotte Market
TikTok-famous La La Land Kind Cafe Opens in Charlotte, NC

shops.notes: Dallas-based viral TikTok coffee chain (yellow cups, 'normalize kindness' mission) took over the former Bitty & Beau's Coffee space at 1930 Camden Rd in South End / Design Center of the Carolinas. Opened its first NC location around April 4, 2026. Likely already gotten review coverage from other CLT creators given viral status, but still time-sensitive given how recent the opening is.

shops.name: Plot Twist

sources.label: Axios Charlotte - Plot Twist, an all-day coffee and cocktail bar, opens soon in Plaza Midwood
Business Debut - New Coffee and Cocktail Concept Opening in Charlotte
WSOCTV - All-day coffee, cocktail bar to debut in Plaza Midwood
Plot Twist CLT Instagram

shops.notes: Self-funded coffee + cocktail 'third place' concept from owners Nikki Velazquez and Eric Flanigan at 1518 Lyon Ct, in a former auto garage/tattoo shop. Opened April 21 serving coffee only; cocktails added in early May. 1,627 sq ft, seats 50 inside, patio opening later summer 2026 for ~90 total capacity. Strong, multi-source coverage.

shops.name: Changebaker Place

sources.label: Axios Charlotte - Activist baker Manuel Betancur opens Changebaker Place cafe
What Now Charlotte - Manolo's Bakery Owner Expanding Operation

shops.notes: New cafe by Manolo's Bakery owner / local activist Manuel Betancur at 4405 Central Ave, next door to Manolo's, inside a former hair salon. Serves pastries, gelato, sandwiches, espresso/coffee with Colombian beans. Quietly opened Jan 17, 2026 then got press coverage in March. Community-space angle and documentary tie-in ('The Changebaker') give it a strong story hook, even though by the publish date it's already outside a strict 60-day opened window — kept in as a notable, under-covered shop worth flagging to Caleb regardless.

shops.name: Sparkhouse Coffee (Sparkhouse Uptown)

sources.label: QCity Metro - Do Greater Charlotte opens Sparkhouse Uptown
WCCB Charlotte - Sparkhouse Uptown grand opening
WFAE - Uptown Charlotte's Sparkhouse opens on Juneteenth

shops.notes: 20,000 sq ft entrepreneurship hub at 500 N. Tryon St (Harvey B. Gantt-owned building) run by nonprofit Do Greater Charlotte, includes a youth-operated coffee shop (Sparkhouse Coffee) alongside co-working, podcast studios, classrooms. Grand opening was June 19, 2026 (Juneteenth) — extremely fresh, well within the 60-day window. Strong community/nonprofit story angle, unique since it's youth-run.

shops.name: Burr & Berry Coffee (4th Charlotte location)

sources.label: Axios Charlotte - Drive-thru coffee chain Burr & Berry adds east Charlotte shop
Hoodline - East Charlotte Snags Burr & Berry Drive-Thru On Monroe Road
What Now Charlotte - Burr & Berry Brewing Up Fourth Charlotte Location

shops.notes: Locally owned drive-thru/walk-up coffee chain (existing locations include South Blvd and Monroe Rd) adding a 4th Charlotte location at 2905 Monroe Road, between Tipsy Burro and Smokey Joe's Cafe near the edge of Elizabeth. Targeting a late-summer 2026 opening with a compact stand format. Good early-coverage candidate since no opening date confirmed yet. No new signal found this run (checked again 2026-06-30) — still no firm date.

shops.name: 7 Brew

sources.label: What Now Charlotte - 7 Brew Targeting Concord For New Location

shops.notes: Building permits indicate a 510 sq ft standalone drive-thru coffee shop at 1275 Concord Pkwy S, Concord, NC 28027. Part of a regional franchise push by investment group WJ Partners aiming for 100 7 Brew locations across the Carolinas/Georgia (announced November 2025). Re-checked 2026-06-30: a CNN Business piece (2026-05-25) on 7 Brew's national push didn't mention this Concord site specifically and noted 2026 growth focus is Texas/Florida/Virginia/Georgia — still no firm opening date found. Worth monitoring for a firmer date since national chain openings draw less unique review interest but are still high-traffic searches.

shops.name: Waterbean Coffee Exquisite
shops.expectedOpening: Opened (exact date unconfirmed; Yelp reviews and grand-opening Facebook post place it in spring 2026)

sources.label: What Now Charlotte - Waterbean Coffee Opening Large Location In Gastonia This Summer
Yelp - Waterbean Coffee Exquisite (618 W Franklin Blvd, Gastonia)
Waterbean Coffee Facebook - grand opening post
Waterbean Exquisite Gastonia Instagram

shops.notes: UPDATED 2026-06-30: confirmed open. 4,100 sq ft flagship-style location at 618 W Franklin Blvd Unit D, Gastonia, NC 28052 (Waterbean's largest of 18+ Greater Charlotte locations), with on-site bakery and high-end specialty coffee under the 'Waterbean Coffee Exquisite' sub-brand. Open daily 7am-9pm. Status upgraded from opening_soon to opened based on active Yelp reviews (dated April 2026), a Facebook grand-opening post, and an active Instagram account.

shops.name: Bad Ass Coffee of Hawaii

sources.label: Post and Courier - York County highlights 'Coffee Trail' as more shops plan openings in 2026
Post and Courier - Fill 'er up: More coffee shops opening across Rock Hill area
K104.7 - Bad Ass Coffee Opens Rock Hill Location as First Step in 3-Store Plan
Yahoo News - Bad Ass Coffee opens Rock Hill shop with more planned

shops.notes: UPDATED 2026-06-30: confirmed open. Hawaiian-themed specialty coffee franchise location opened at 220 W. White St. in Rock Hill, SC, inside The Thread (converted 400,000 sq ft textile mill near downtown). Franchise agreement requires opening at least 3 stores in York County over the next two years, so 2 more locations are planned. Status upgraded from opening_soon to opened given multiple independent local/regional outlets covering the opening in mid-June 2026.

shops.name: Scooter's Coffee

sources.label: Post and Courier - York County highlights 'Coffee Trail' as more shops plan openings in 2026
AllEvents - Scooters Coffee Grand Opening Celebration, 4971 Old York Rd
Yelp - Scooter's Coffee, 4971 Old York Rd, Rock Hill

shops.notes: UPDATED 2026-06-30: confirmed open. National drive-thru chain location at 4971 Old York Road, Rock Hill SC opened with grand opening dated Jan 16, 2026 (soft open) and a follow-up grand opening celebration event Jan 30, 2026. Status upgraded from opening_soon to opened; confidence kept at medium since it's still a thin national-chain story with no unique local feature coverage, but the corroborating event listing + active Yelp page confirm it's operating.

shops.name: Ellianos Coffee

sources.label: Post and Courier - York County highlights 'Coffee Trail' as more shops plan openings in 2026
GlobeNewswire - Ellianos Coffee Announces Expansion to South Carolina
QSR Magazine - Ellianos Coffee to Expand in South Carolina

shops.notes: UPDATED 2026-06-30: upgraded rumored to confirmed. Florida-based drive-thru coffee chain signed a one-store development agreement for Clover, SC (York County, just SW of Rock Hill / outer Metrolina) per an official company press release (GlobeNewswire, Nov 2025) corroborating the original Post and Courier mention. Still no address or firm opening date found — needs a follow-up search for permits or a more specific local announcement before upgrading further to opening_soon.

shops.name: Parkin' Latte (storefront expansion)
shops.expectedOpening: Blacksburg storefront opened January 2026; Clover storefront status still unconfirmed

sources.label: Post and Courier - York County highlights 'Coffee Trail' as more shops plan openings in 2026
What Now Charlotte - Parkin' Latte Bringing Brick-and-Mortar Coffee Shop To Blacksburg

shops.notes: UPDATED 2026-06-30: existing mobile coffee business (owner Briana Harris) confirmed to have opened its first storefront at 113 N Shelby Street, Blacksburg, SC (Cherokee County) in January 2026 — the 2025 York County 'Best Coffee+Barista' winner. The Clover, SC storefront mentioned in the original Jan 2026 article has not been separately confirmed as open; this entry is being kept under 'Clover' city per the original lead but really tracks the broader 2-storefront expansion. Status set to opened based on the confirmed Blacksburg location; flag that the Clover-specific storefront still needs verification. This remains at the far southwestern edge of what Caleb might consider 'Metrolina' — borderline geography.

shops.name: Dutch Bros Coffee

sources.label: WBTV - Dutch Bros announces opening day for first Charlotte-area shop
QC News - Dutch Bros just opened its first Rock Hill spot: here's what to expect

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: this is Dutch Bros' first Charlotte-area location, opened 5am Tuesday March 31, 2026 along Celanese Road in Rock Hill, SC (~30 min from Uptown Charlotte). Oregon-based drive-thru chain. Company has announced further Carolinas expansion plans including Mooresville and Indian Trail NC, and Rock Hill, Boiling Springs, Mount Pleasant, Charleston SC (see separate Mooresville entry) — worth tracking each as a distinct location/entry as they firm up.

shops.name: Dutch Bros Coffee

sources.label: Roadtrippers - Dutch Bros Coffee, Coming Soon, Mooresville
WBTV - Dutch Bros announces opening day for first Charlotte-area shop (notes planned NC/SC expansion incl. Mooresville)
RJR Pine Whispers - Grounds for change: Dutch Bros replaces Clutch Coffee
Real Estate Daily News - Dutch Bros Acquires Clutch Coffee Bar, Bringing the Brand to 20 Locations Across North Carolina

shops.notes: CORRECTED 2026-07-07: this is NOT new construction — it's a converted Clutch Coffee Bar location. Clutch (a Mooresville-founded, 20-unit NC/SC drive-thru chain co-founded by ex-Dutch Bros manager Darren Spicer) was acquired by Dutch Bros in a deal announced Jan 16, 2026; all Clutch stores closed briefly for rebrand/renovation and reopened as Dutch Bros around March 26, 2026. The 356 Williamson Rd, Mooresville NC 28117 address tracked here was a Clutch location and is now operating as Dutch Bros. Status upgraded from confirmed to opened accordingly. Same acquisition also converted the existing Indian Trail Clutch into Dutch Bros — see separate 'dutch-bros-indian-trail' entry.

shops.name: Caribou Coffee

sources.label: Mooresville Tribune - National coffee chain to open in Mooresville, NC
Caribou Coffee - East Plaza & Statesville (Drive-Thru) location page

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: Caribou Coffee opened a new drive-thru + indoor/outdoor seating location at 553 E Plaza Dr, Mooresville, NC, at the intersection of E Plaza Dr and Statesville Hwy near Food Lion. This is Caribou's second new NC opening this year, bringing their statewide count to twelve. National chain, but fresh enough (June 2026) and distinct from the existing Mooresville Caribou/Defined Coffee/Ellianos locations already in town.

shops.name: Most Dope Coffee

sources.label: What Now Charlotte - Most Dope Coffee Bringing Filipino Twist To Rock Hill Coffee Scene
WRHI - Filipino-Inspired Coffee Concept Set to Debut in Rock Hill's Power House Building
Post and Courier - Fill 'er up: More coffee shops opening across Rock Hill area

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: Filipino-inspired specialty coffee shop owned by Michael Mendoza and Wayne Martin (also own Red Wolf Martial Arts) at 378 Technology Center Way, Suite 103, in the Power House food hall, Rock Hill SC. Signature drinks include calamansi sweet tea and ube beverages, beans sourced largely from the Philippines. Strong unique-angle story (hip-hop-influenced branding, Filipino coffee culture) — good review candidate.

shops.name: Mug & Maple
shops.expectedOpening: Opened mid-April 2026; grand opening celebration began May 1, 2026

sources.label: Post and Courier - Mug & Maple cafe aims to become a Rock Hill coffee destination
Hoodline - Maple Madness Hits Rock Hill as Health First Coffee Bar Plans Power House Debut
What Now Charlotte - Mug and Maple Bringing Health-Centric Menu To Rock Hill Community
Power House Rock Hill Facebook - Mug & Maple officially opened

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: owned by Nate and Kate Kingsley at 378 Technology Center Way, Power House food hall, Rock Hill SC (same building as Most Dope Coffee). 'No seed oils, no bleached grains, no artificial anything' health-centric philosophy; coffee sourced from Jags Head, a Charlotte-based roaster. Signature drinks: Honey Beean (vanilla + local NC honey latte), The OG Maple (New England maple syrup). Cozy New England-flair lounge with couches and outdoor seating. Multi-source, fresh, strong story — good review candidate.

shops.name: Koda & Co Coffee
shops.expectedOpening: Opened; exact date unconfirmed, Yelp activity visible by Dec 2025

sources.label: Post and Courier - Fill 'er up: More coffee shops opening across Rock Hill area
Yelp - Koda & Coffee, 911 E White St, Rock Hill

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: located at 911 E White St, Rock Hill SC. Single-source roundup mention with no firm opening date; Yelp listing activity suggests it may have already been open since late 2025, which would put it outside the strict 60-day freshness window — flagged low confidence accordingly, included for completeness of the York County coffee-shop picture.

shops.name: The Roasting Route
shops.expectedOpening: Soft opened late April 2026; grand opening celebration May 13, 2026

sources.label: Tega Cay Sun - New Coffee Shop Brews Up in Fort Mill With a Unique Twist
FortMillNow Facebook - The Roasting Route has officially landed in Fort Mill
Post and Courier - Fill 'er up: More coffee shops opening across Rock Hill area

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: combination coffee shop / shipping counter / gift shop concept (Tega Cay Coffee Company expansion) located inside The Postal Route at 2764 Pleasant Rd, Fort Mill, SC. Nautical-themed interior with a private meeting room. Soft opened with limited hours (8am-1pm) in late April 2026, full grand opening celebration was May 13, 2026 ($1 drinks, 20% off gift items). Strong multi-source, unique-concept story.

shops.name: Haraz Coffee House

sources.label: Yelp - Haraz Coffee House, 2373 Len Patterson Rd, Fort Mill
FortMillNow Facebook - Haraz Coffee House is officially open in Fort Mill
Haraz Coffee House - Fort Mill, SC Instagram

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: Yemeni-style coffee chain's first South Carolina location at 2373 Len Patterson Rd, Ste 103, Fort Mill SC (their 15th state, 51st location nationwide). Soft opened May 20, 2026, hours 6am-11pm Mon-Fri. Distinct from Haraz's existing/announced Charlotte-area locations (South End, University City, Concord) reported in earlier Axios coverage — this is a separate physical location and review opportunity. Part of the broader 'Yemeni coffee craze' wave in the region (Haraz, Qahwah House, Qamaria).

shops.name: Summit Farms (Summit Coffee village)
shops.expectedOpening: Spring 2027; construction on infrastructure/trails/greenways started April 2026

sources.label: Axios Charlotte - Davidson farm village by Summit Coffee set to break ground
Davidson's Restaurant Scene in 2026 - Sadler Square, Summit Farms blog post

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: large-scale 62-acre farm-to-table village from the team behind Davidson-born Summit Coffee. Will include Summit's new 7,000 sq ft headquarters and roasting facility, a 10-acre organic farm, on-site market/deli/wood-fired pizza restaurant, and a 3,000 sq ft Silly Goose Bakeshop retail space showcasing Summit's bakery program. This is a major, far-out story (targeting spring 2027) rather than a near-term opening, but significant enough to flag now given Summit Coffee's local profile — revisit periodically for groundbreaking/construction milestones rather than expecting near-term review-readiness.

shops.name: Kuppa Joe

sources.label: Hoodline - Gastonia Family's 'Kuppa Joe' Quietly Brews A New West Franklin Hangout
Gaston Gazette Facebook - Kuppa Joe is now open in Gastonia

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: family-owned coffee shop at 3888 W. Franklin Blvd, Gastonia NC (former Sweet Scoops ice cream space), opened Feb 14, 2026. Owner Darrin Trapp named it in honor of his late brother Joe and late sister Karen; living-room-style interior with couches and family photos. Already outside the strict 60-day freshness window as of this run, but kept in given the strong community/family story angle (same precedent as Changebaker Place) and that it surfaced for the first time this run.

shops.name: Pint & Page (bookstore + coffee + biergarten)
shops.expectedOpening: Unannounced; in active construction/development as of mid-2026

sources.label: Lake Norman Publications - Tiebreaker vote clears way for new downtown Huntersville businesses
Pint and Page official site
Pint and Page Facebook - progress update

shops.notes: NEW 2026-06-30: combination bookstore / coffee shop / biergarten planned at 117 Gilead Road in downtown Huntersville, NC. Zoning approved January 2025; owners posting 'steady progress' construction updates as of 2026 but no firm opening date yet. One of the only concrete 'coming soon' coffee-adjacent leads found for Huntersville this run — town otherwise returned thin signal (mostly existing operators: Coffee Republic, Defined Coffee, Harvest Artisan Cafe, Caribou).

shops.name: Dutch Bros Coffee

sources.label: QSR Magazine - Dutch Bros to Acquire Drive-Thru Chain Clutch Coffee
Dutch Bros Coffee - Indian Trail location page
Real Estate Daily News - Dutch Bros Acquires Clutch Coffee Bar, Bringing the Brand to 20 Locations Across North Carolina

shops.notes: NEW 2026-07-07: one of the original Clutch Coffee Bar locations at 13947 E Independence Blvd, Indian Trail NC, converted to Dutch Bros as part of the ~20-store Clutch acquisition (announced Jan 16, 2026, conversions completed around March 26, 2026). Wasn't previously tracked in this file; surfaced while following up on the Mooresville Dutch Bros entry. National chain / lower unique-review priority, but confirmed open and Indian Trail's first Dutch Bros.

shops.name: Cocotte French Bakery (2nd location)

sources.label: What Now Charlotte - Cocotte French Bakery Expanding Its Footprint With Second Location
K104.7 - Cocotte French Bakery Will Open Second Location in Huntersville This Summer
Cocotte official site (Cornelius flagship)

shops.notes: NEW 2026-07-07: French bakery + coffee shop (founders Alexandre Darbousset and Angela Yeo) opening a second location at 111 Gilead Road, Huntersville, NC, less than two years after their original Cornelius location (9623 Bailey Road) opened. Targeting late July/early August 2026, guest-experience-focused with a children's corner like the Cornelius flagship. Multi-source, specific address and near-term window — good early review candidate to watch for the actual opening.

shops.name: Southern Grounds & Co. (Dilworth + Plaza Midwood)
shops.expectedOpening: Unannounced; letters of intent signed, leases not yet finalized

sources.label: What Now Charlotte - Southern Grounds & Co. Plans First North Carolina Locations in Charlotte
K104.7 - Southern Grounds & Co. Eyes Charlotte for First Expansion Beyond Florida

shops.notes: NEW 2026-07-07: Florida-based (Neptune Beach) hybrid coffee shop / bakery / restaurant concept, founded 2016, has signed letters of intent (per founder Mark Janasik) for two Charlotte locations in Dilworth and Plaza Midwood — would be Southern Grounds' first expansion outside Florida. No addresses, no finalized leases, no opening dates as of this run. Tracking as a single entry for now covering both planned neighborhoods since neither has a firm site yet; split into separate per-neighborhood entries once addresses/leases are confirmed. Confidence kept low per playbook guidance (LOI-stage, no finalized lease) despite the multiple outlet pickups, since all coverage traces back to the same single announcement.
